description:
Power On and Off WebOS LG TVs together with your PC.

This application (UI and service) controls LG WebOS TVs and displays.
This is a critical release to restore connectivity for new firmware (43.00.92+)
Bugfixes and updates:
- Adaptation of WebOS handshake for registering with the API
- Correctly parse XML in event log
The release changes the connection handshake but should be transparent and not trigger a new pairing with the TV, but please let me know if you are experiencing issues.
